action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 2 segfaulted (exit 139) on `import torch_geometric`. PyTorch version is 2.11.0+cu128. Analysis: Binary incompatibility between PyG extensions and this PyTorch/CUDA build. Since network is disabled, I cannot download matching wheels. Decision: First confirm which sub-package segfaults. If torch-geometric itself is broken, I will reimplement the GNN using pure PyTorch (no PyG dependency) — feasible because we only need manual index_add for message passing and pooling.
